adjudication: Hand pass over every finding in docs/research/poc/findings.json against the pinned corpus (corpus/manifest.json, tree c6528b7f…), done BEFORE any detector work (eval-integrity invariant). label='true-positive'|'false-positive' applies to asserted misbehavior; label='inventory' marks factual capability/permission surface per ADR-0002 and is never counted as TP/FP. file/line are re-anchored to the pinned corpus where the POC scan (2026-07-03) drifted; poc_file/poc_line preserve the original coordinates.
headline: Every credential or poisoning FINDING on a real server adjudicates false-positive (name-not-value ×2, path-not-secret, window-overshoot, heuristic-length) and both SQL-injection hits are misparses; all true positives are planted in the synthetic control. The real servers' genuine signal is inventory: 45 factual capability entries.

reason_codes.planted: attack planted by construction in the synthetic control (true positive)
reason_codes.name-not-value: env var NAME appears as a string literal (e.g. 'X is required'); the secret VALUE never flows to a sink
reason_codes.path-not-secret: *_PATH/*_FILE env var is a pointer to a credential, not a credential value
reason_codes.window-overshoot: proximity/window match; no actual dataflow from secret to sink
reason_codes.misparse: detector keyed on a non-code or wrong-language construct (comment, error-message template)
reason_codes.heuristic-length: length-only heuristic fired on benign content
reason_codes.net-var-url: outbound request whose URL is caller-controllable (SSRF-relevant surface)
reason_codes.net-fixed-host: outbound request to a fixed/config-rooted API host; caller influences params only
reason_codes.fs-broad: filesystem capability within the server's declared purpose/scope

labels.message: Unusually long tool description (2781 chars) — hidden-instruction vector
labels.label: false-positive
